function.name: mantella.server_start
function.description: Start the Mantella AI NPC server for Fallout 4

function.name: mantella.server_stop
function.description: Stop the running Mantella AI NPC server

function.name: mantella.server_status
function.description: Get the current status of the Mantella server including connected game and active NPCs

function.name: mantella.set_config
function.description: Set a configuration value in the Mantella config file

key.description: Specific config key to retrieve (omit for all settings)

function.name: mantella.reload
function.description: Reload the Mantella server configuration without full restart
